name: Booker T. Washington Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Booker T. Washington Recreation Center in Cleburne, TX! There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Burleson Church of Christ
description: Burleson Church of Christ is a place to play pickleball in Burleson, TX. There are 3 indoor acrylic and wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Burleson Recreation Center BRICK
description: Come play pickleball at Burleson Recreation Center BRICK in Burleson, TX! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. Reservations are not available.
fees: Fee required — $3 fee per session. $8 fee to sign up for the month. This only allows you to play pickleball during the scheduled slots above.

name: Parkway park
description: Parkway park is a place to play pickleball in Alvarado, TX. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Southern Oaks Tennis and Golf Club
description: Southern Oaks Tennis and Golf Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Burleson, TX. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play. Amenities include food, restrooms, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, water, wheelchair accessibility, trainers or lessons, and locker rooms.
fees: Members only — $5.00 drop in fee or monthly membership, month-to-month is 25.00. Pay at the clubhouse.
hours: Monday – Sunday | 7 AM – 7 PM Weather 13765 Southern Oaks Dr Southern Oaks Golf & Tennis Club Copyright © 2026 Southern Oaks Golf & Tennis Club All Rights Reserved. Powered by

name: Texas Health Huguley Fitness Center
description: Texas Health Huguley Fitness Center is a place to play pickleball in Burleson, TX. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, and water. The courts can be reserved.

name: Warren Park
description: Warren Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Burleson, TX. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.
